```sql
    CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "rol_id" INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
  "nombre" varchar UNIQUE NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE "usuarios" (
  "usuario_id" INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
  "rol_id" integer,
  "rut" varchar UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  "nombre" varchar NOT NULL,
  "apellido_paterno" varchar NOT NULL,
  "apellido_materno" varchar,
  "email" varchar UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  "password" varchar  NOT NULL,
  "activo" boolean DEFAULT true
);

CREATE TABLE "estudiantes" (
  "estudiante_id" integer PRIMARY KEY,
  "curso_id" integer
);

CREATE TABLE "docentes" (
  "docente_id" integer PRIMARY KEY,
  "especialidad" varchar
);

CREATE TABLE "apoderados" (
  "apoderado_id" integer PRIMARY KEY
);

CREATE TABLE "apoderado_estudiante" (
  "apoderado_id" integer,
  "estudiante_id" integer,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apoderado_id", "estudiante_id")
);

CREATE TABLE "asignaturas" (
  "asignatura_id" INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
  "nombre" varchar NOT NULL,
  "siglas" varchar UNIQUE
);

CREATE TABLE "cursos" (
  "curso_id" INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
  "nivel" varchar NOT NULL,
  "letra" char(1) NOT NULL,
  "anio_academico" integer NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE "curso_asignatura_docente" (
  "id" INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
  "curso_id" integer,
  "asignatura_id" integer,
  "docente_id" integer
);

CREATE TABLE "evaluaciones" (
  "evaluacion_id" INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
  "cad_id" integer,
  "nombre" varchar NOT NULL,
  "fecha_evaluacion" date
);

CREATE TABLE "notas" (
  "nota_id" INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
  "evaluacion_id" integer,
  "estudiante_id" integer,
  "valor" float NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE "asistencia" (
  "asistencia_id" INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
  "estudiante_id" integer,
  "curso_id" integer,
  "fecha" date NOT NULL,
  "estado" varchar NOT NULL,
  "tipo_asistencia" varchar
);

CREATE TABLE "anotaciones" (
  "anotacion_id" INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
  "estudiante_id" integer,
  "docente_id" integer,
  "tipo" varchar NOT NULL,
  "descripcion" text NOT NULL,
  "fecha_registro" timestamp DEFAULT (now())
);

CREATE TABLE "salas" (
  "sala_id" serial PRIMARY KEY
);

CREATE TABLE "sala_evaluacione_asistencia" (
  "sala_id" integer,
  "evaluacion_id" integer,
  "asistencia_id" integer
);

ALTER TABLE "usuarios" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("rol_id") REFERENCES "roles" ("rol_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "estudiantes" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("estudiante_id") REFERENCES "usuarios" ("usuario_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "estudiantes" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("curso_id") REFERENCES "cursos" ("curso_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "docentes" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("docente_id") REFERENCES "usuarios" ("usuario_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "apoderados" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("apoderado_id") REFERENCES "usuarios" ("usuario_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "apoderado_estudiante" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("apoderado_id") REFERENCES "apoderados" ("apoderado_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "apoderado_estudiante" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("estudiante_id") REFERENCES "estudiantes" ("estudiante_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "curso_asignatura_docente" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("curso_id") REFERENCES "cursos" ("curso_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "curso_asignatura_docente" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("asignatura_id") REFERENCES "asignaturas" ("asignatura_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "curso_asignatura_docente" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("docente_id") REFERENCES "docentes" ("docente_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "evaluaciones" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("cad_id") REFERENCES "curso_asignatura_docente" ("id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "notas" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("evaluacion_id") REFERENCES "evaluaciones" ("evaluacion_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "notas" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("estudiante_id") REFERENCES "estudiantes" ("estudiante_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "asistencia" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("estudiante_id") REFERENCES "estudiantes" ("estudiante_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "asistencia" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("curso_id") REFERENCES "cursos" ("curso_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "anotaciones" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("estudiante_id") REFERENCES "estudiantes" ("estudiante_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "anotaciones" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("docente_id") REFERENCES "docentes" ("docente_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "sala_evaluacione_asistencia" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("sala_id") REFERENCES "salas" ("sala_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "sala_evaluacione_asistencia" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("evaluacion_id") REFERENCES "evaluaciones" ("evaluacion_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;

ALTER TABLE "sala_evaluacione_asistencia" ADD FOREIGN KEY ("asistencia_id") REFERENCES "asistencia" ("asistencia_id") DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE;
```
